meta.title: Line Cut — Digital Printing, Cutting & Finishing
meta.description: Digital printing, cutting and finishing — produced accurately from your file. Line Cut, Holon.

hero.title: Digital printing, cutting and finishing — produced accurately from your file
hero.subtitle: We specialize in digital printing, precise cutting and finishing for signage, stickers, exhibitions and tailored production projects — for designers, institutions, museums, galleries and production teams.
hero.ctaSecondary: Get in touch for a quote
hero.imageAlt: Line Cut printing and cutting work

items.accurate: Accurate production from your supplied files
items.oneRoof: Printing, cutting and finishing in one place
items.exhibitions: Deep experience with exhibitions and signage
items.fast: Fast production options based on availability
items.audience: For designers, businesses, institutions and production teams

clients.heading: Brands, institutions and teams we've worked with

names.islamMuseum: Museum of Islamic Culture, Be'er Sheva
names.einHarod: Mishkan Museum of Art, Ein Harod

services.heading: What we produce
services.intro: Printing, cutting and finishing under one roof — from simple jobs to complex projects.

stickers.title: Stickers & roll printing
stickers.description: A wide range of stickers and adhesive products, digitally printed.

signage.title: Letter cutting & signage
signage.description: Cut letters and signage made to size, material and design.

rigid.title: Printing on rigid materials
rigid.description: Printing and mounting on rigid materials for display and signage.

exhibitions.title: Exhibitions, museums & galleries
exhibitions.description: Signage and graphics produced to architectural or graphic specs.
examples: Color matching to a visual guide

custom.title: Custom production work
custom.description: Production from your files and project requirements, including complex jobs.

why.heading: Why work with Line Cut
why.intro: A reliable, precise production partner — not a cheap print shop.

items.title: Technical file understanding
items.body: We spot and solve file, cutting, size and format issues before production.

items.title: Everything under one roof
items.body: Printing, cutting and finishing in one place — an organized, transparent process.

items.title: Experience with complex jobs
items.body: Exhibitions, large stickers, multi-page files and custom dimensions.

items.title: Fast production
items.body: Fast production solutions when you need them, based on availability.

items.title: Accuracy & reliability
items.body: Precise manufacturing and a result you can trust, from file to delivery.

items.title: Hands-on support
items.body: Close support from file preparation to pickup, delivery or installation.

process.heading: How we work
process.intro: A clear, organized process — from file to finished result.

file.title: Your file
file.body: You send a print-ready file (PDF) with final dimensions.

review.title: Technical review
review.body: We check the file, cut lines, size and material before production.

production.title: Production
production.body: Accurate printing and cutting to spec.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Pickup, delivery or installation — as needed.

gallery.heading: Selected work
gallery.intro: Stickers, signage, exhibitions and rigid-material prints.

studio.heading: Products & creations by Line Cut
studio.body: From time to time we make our own products — and we can produce them at scale. A product catalog is coming soon.
studio.ctaMessage: Hi, I'd like to hear about your products
studio.imageAlt: A product made by Line Cut

formats.q: What file format should I send?
formats.a: A print-ready PDF with final dimensions and cut lines where needed. We're happy to review the file before production.

turnaround.a: It depends on the job and material. We offer fast production options based on availability — tell us your deadline.

materials.q: Which materials do you print on?
materials.a: Vinyl, PVC, foam board/Kappa, acrylic/Perspex and more — direct print or print and mount.

delivery.q: Do you offer pickup, delivery and installation?
delivery.a: Yes. You can collect from our Holon studio, receive a delivery, or arrange installation.

minOrder.a: We handle short runs and one-off jobs as well as larger orders.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: Tell us about your project — we're happy to review a file and give a quote.
contact.success: Thanks! We received your message and will get back to you shortly.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again or reach us on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Digital printing, cutting and finishing — Holon.

legal.termsBody:

meta.title: Order Stickers — Line Cut
meta.description: Build your sticker order, preview the A4 sheet layout and get an instant price — precise production by Line Cut, Holon.

intro.heading: Order stickers
intro.subheading: Upload your files, choose a quantity, and we'll handle the rest.
intro.lead: WebP stickers are printed on A4 sheets and delivered kiss-cut. Upload up to 200 files, preview the layout, and get a price before you confirm.

upload.mobileHint: Tap to open your Photos or Files picker

errors.notWebp: Only WebP files are accepted. {name} was skipped.
errors.tooMany: You can upload up to {max} stickers. Extra files were skipped.
errors.tooBig: {name} is larger than {limit} and was skipped.
errors.empty: No stickers yet — add some to see a preview and price.
errors.networkOffline: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.uploadsIncomplete: Some files didn't finish uploading — please go back and try again.

preview.heading: Sheet preview
preview.disclaimer: Preview only — the final page distribution will differ.

pricing.heading: Your order
pricing.copiesHint: Each copy prints every uploaded sticker once.
pricing.pricePending: Final price is confirmed before printing.

checkout.heading: Delivery details
checkout.paymentNote: No payment is taken now — we'll confirm your order and arrange payment before printing.

receipt.heading: Order received
receipt.noPaymentYet: No payment has been taken yet.
receipt.saveLink: Save this link to track your order.

email.subjectReceived: Line Cut — we received your sticker order #{id}
email.bodyReceived: Thanks! We received your order of {sheets} A4 sheets ({copies} copies). We'll confirm and arrange payment before printing.
